---
title: "Publications"
---

## Peer-Reviewed Publications

### 2025

- **陈思羽**, 潘晚坷, 胡传鹏. (2025). [基于证据积累的认知决策神经网络模型](https://journal.psych.ac.cn/xlkxjz/CN/10.3724/SP.J.1042.2025.2043). *心理科学进展*, *33*(12), 2043-2053. [https://doi.org/10.3724/SP.J.1042.2025.2043](https://journal.psych.ac.cn/xlkxjz/CN/10.3724/SP.J.1042.2025.2043)

---

*Last updated: March 2026*
